# Repository Documentation Maintainer Skill

This skill covers durable documentation maintenance in pgPacTool, including README accuracy,
docs index updates, feature-folder placement, and keeping version/status metadata aligned with
actual repo behavior.

## Use this skill when changing
- user-visible behavior
- architecture/implementation that affects docs
- version support statements
- docs index/navigation
- README metadata/footer lines

## Primary references
- `SKILL.md`
- `../../../README.md`
- `../../../docs/README.md`
